KIMI_CONTRACT_OBSERVATIONS_PATH.restrictions: must be a relative path from project root

KIMI_CONTRACT_SCHEMA_VERSION.restrictions: semver string written/read by contract inference

KIMI_HOOK_VERIFIER_MAX_CYCLES.restrictions: positive integer — max allowed hook-graph cycle length

KIMI_DECISION_SCORE_WINDOW_DAYS.restrictions: positive integer — decision score rolling window in days (Phase 2)

KIMI_OPTIMIZER_CONFIDENCE_DECAY_DAYS.restrictions: positive integer — linear decay window for insufficient-data confidence (Phase 3.2)

KIMI_RUNTIME_MIN_BUN_VERSION.restrictions: semver — minimum Bun runtime version required by toolchain tooling

KIMI_RUNTIME_CLI_BUILD_CHANNEL.restrictions: one of source | release | canary — identifies how CLI binaries were built

KIMI_DASHBOARD_LIVE_REFRESH_ENABLED.restrictions: boolean flag — when false, dashboard live refresh is disabled

KIMI_EFFECT_MAX_DIRECT_PROMISE.restrictions: zero-tolerance threshold for bare Promise usage in service code

KIMI_LAYER_CIRCULARITY_TOLERANCE.restrictions: zero-tolerance threshold for circular layer dependencies

KIMI_SERVICE_TAG_REQUIRED.restrictions: when true, exported services must be provided through Tag + Layer

KIMI_EFFECT_RUN_PROMISE_BOUNDARY_ENABLED.restrictions: when true, Effect.runPromise calls outside src/cli, src/entry, src/runtime.ts, or test files are flagged

KIMI_EFFECT_BENCHMARK_ITERATIONS.restrictions: positive integer — measured iterations per effect handler

KIMI_EFFECT_BENCHMARK_WARMUP.restrictions: non-negative integer — warmup iterations discarded before measurement

KIMI_EFFECT_BENCHMARK_TRAIN_MARGIN.restrictions: multiplier >= 1.0 — trained threshold margin over measured median

KIMI_EFFECT_BENCHMARK_REGRESSION_TOLERAN.restrictions: multiplier >= 1.0 — regression tolerance when comparing to previous snapshot

KIMI_EFFECT_BENCHMARK_DEFAULT_THRESHOLD_.restrictions: positive number — fallback threshold (ms) for handlers without a default

KIMI_EFFECT_BENCHMARK_SNAPSHOT_MAX_RUNS.restrictions: positive integer — max NDJSON snapshot rows retained per project

KIMI_EFFECT_BENCHMARK_RUN_TIMEOUT_MS.restrictions: positive integer — max wall-clock ms for a dashboard benchmark run

KIMI_EFFECT_BENCHMARK_POST_COOLDOWN_MS.restrictions: positive integer — min ms between POST refresh/train requests

KIMI_TUNING_SET_VERSION.restrictions: semver — bump when any other KIMI_* define is added, changed, or removed
